THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
